title: Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee Acceptable Use Policy
summary: This policy governs the acceptable use of diocesan computer equipment, systems, networks, and communications services by all employees, volunteers, contractors, and affiliated personnel of the Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee.
notes: 1. No formal effective date is stated on the face of the document; the earliest revision history entry is 07/01/2010, used as a proxy with low confidence. 2. No explicit next-review date or review cadence is stated; next_review_date left null. 3. The document references a Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) by title in the enforcement section, which may suggest that role — rather than a generic 'IT Director' — is the responsible owner; a human reviewer should confirm the correct diocesan title. 4. The document defers data retention periods to USCCB guidelines and individual department heads rather than specifying a diocesan retention period, so retention_period_years is left null. 5. File-level server backups are described as retained for two weeks, but this is a backup window, not a records-retention period. 6. The document internally numbers two separate sections as '7.0' (Definitions and Revision History), which is a drafting error a reviewer should flag for correction. 7. No formal version number appears in the document itself; version stamp of 1.0 is the metadata schema default. 8. The suggested chapter/section address is a placeholder based on common IT policy numbering conventions; the diocese's actual policy manual numbering scheme is not provided in this document.
